tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device

ls -l /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar && runuser -u  agent -- sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps -name "*.png" -type f -size -500k 2>/devv/null | head -1; tar -czf /tmp/test.tar.gz /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.ppng >/dev/null 2>&1; echo TAR_EXIT:$?'
